name: instant-api — promote approval flow
description: Email-link approval gate for stack promotion (PR #65 era). Tracks time-to-approval, rejection rate, and bypass detection. Source: audit_log records with audit_kind IN ('promote.approval_requested', 'promote.approved', 'promote.rejected') emitted by api/internal/handlers/stack.go. Pairs with the promote-bypass-detected alert.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT histogram(approval_latency_seconds, 50, 20) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'promote.approved' AND approval_latency_seconds IS NOT NULL SINCE 7 days ago

SELECT (filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'promote.approved') / (filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'promote.approved') + filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'promote.rejected'))) * 100 AS 'approved %' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind IN ('promote.approved', 'promote.rejected') SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'promote.approval_requested' FACET env SINCE 7 days ago

widgets.title: Approval funnel (requested vs approved vs rejected)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind IN ('promote.approval_requested', 'promote.approved', 'promote.rejected') FACET audit_kind TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 7 days ago

widgets.title: Pending approvals (requested but not yet resolved)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT filter(uniqueCount(approval_token), WHERE audit_kind = 'promote.approval_requested') - filter(uniqueCount(approval_token), WHERE audit_kind IN ('promote.approved', 'promote.rejected')) AS 'pending' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind IN ('promote.approval_requested', 'promote.approved', 'promote.rejected') SINCE 24 hours ago
